text:
HUTAGENT
The systth. where it lives.
It runs in your environment - cloud and iocal.
Mutagent installs as agents lnside the coding agent you already use. The agents run locaily - your traces and code never leave your machlne - while reading from and writing to your own platforms.
YouR EnvIRonHENT your platforas: clood- local
++id+nce 1n SOURCES Openlelhmetry M Dtdog B lantruat
Clrd+ Coot': o cde. G cunvE 1 a xm ng aont + Lota - datl nwr levte
condcote trw Fteoyde = ont soirt per staoa:Orcbrstrator
i. += titc+1 gtrerates
aroot ebulld C+.l-ator RESEARCH DREYIE +r+l. agent RESEARCH: Diupnostirs sdlagaost: PRETIE!
2 at+att in Itptrth, prtvita
rhere it azit神s TARCltS cod+ [* cavde cooe! o Codax G areor codirg al+nt..ad [ Lata rptgt ] fIs+aoiks * coA ro. cloud-Hagd
Targrts run n ntt reurd of treot - mtrhtr cotrs thtm sid th+ ereht'taor rurs the laop *gi'y.
RuNs LOCally': EnBedd! ht'de yeur codrg sgent -- A hcsted Llutagtet pleitora or Lrg+d Agerts ese-fervce -- +eh -haut ge tuhy Turaged. Yh+h you +mt ht.. sUTURE:CLOUD PlaTfORN
Jhe Armtic Bene Burak 1$ /14
